title: Pest Control quarterly service
details: Optional interior general pest treatment is available at exclusive pricing for Parc homeowners.
• $35 if scheduled during quarterly service visit
• $75 if scheduled independently at another time
To schedule your interior treatment, contact Preventive Pest Control at 801-566-5590.

title: Balcony Railing Inspections
details: As a reminder, the HOA is responsible for railing maintenance. We kindly ask all residents to inspect their balcony railings.
If your railing appears rusted, loose, or damaged, please submit a maintenance request through Vantaca so it can be scheduled for repair.

title: Parking Lot Pressure Washing
details: The parking lot will be pressure washed.
Exact dates will be posted on notice boards once confirmed. We appreciate your cooperation.

title: Mandatory Dryer Vent Cleaning
details: The HOA will soon be sending information regarding a mandatory safety dryer vent cleaning program for all units.
Please keep an eye on communications sent by PMSI for important details, scheduling, and instructions.
